notes: Source is the official AJA product page (aja.com/products/ha5-plus) and ManualsLib page 16 specs (manualslib.com/manual/746562/Aja-Ha5-Plus.html). HDMI v1.4 and 3G-SDI grade confirmed from official page. Two RCA analog audio inputs confirmed. USB connector sub-type (Mini-B vs Micro-B) was not explicitly stated in any available documentation; Micro-B noted as most likely for this product generation but should be verified physically. Power connector described as "locking DC barrel" in AJA documentation — exact barrel diameter not specified. Confidence is medium due to USB connector sub-type uncertainty.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: Equalized input, supports runs up to 30m with 24 AWG cable. Does not pass HDCP-protected content.

ports.name: SDI Out
ports.note: 3G/HD/SD-SDI, SMPTE-259/292/296/424/425, Level A or B Dual Link mapping; also operates at 1.5G and 270 Mb/s SD rates.

ports.name: Analog Audio In L
ports.note: Unbalanced, -10 dBu nominal. One of two RCA analog audio inputs (2-channel stereo pair) for embedding into SDI output.

ports.name: Analog Audio In R
ports.note: Unbalanced, -10 dBu nominal. One of two RCA analog audio inputs (2-channel stereo pair) for embedding into SDI output.

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Used for device configuration via AJA MiniConfig software on Mac or PC. Exact USB sub-type (Mini-B vs Micro-B) not explicitly stated in available specs; USB Micro-B is the most common on AJA mini-converters of this era but could be Mini-B — verify physically.

ports.name: DC Power In
ports.note: Locking DC barrel connector; +5V DC regulated, 3W. Powered by included AJA DWP-U-R1 universal supply (100–240V, 50/60 Hz). Optional P-TAP cable available for battery/field use.
